title: XRP jumps 4% as traders watch 'triangle breakout' toward $1.35
summary: XRP pushed higher over 24 hours and tested short-term resistance, but the larger chart still needs a clean break above the $1.24-$1.28 supply zone to confirm a stronger reversal.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs post a fifth straight day of inflows in a first since April
summary: The run has pulled in roughly $727 million, the most sustained stretch of buying since the record outflows of June.

title: UK Parliament begins inquiry into banking chokepoint for crypto businesses
summary: The U.K.’s Crypto and Digital Assets All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) is focused on banks that refused crypto firms accounts or introduced restrictions on crypto transactions.

title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high near $65,500 as the chip trade turns back into a tailwind
summary: Asian semiconductor shares rebounded hard, a five-day ETF inflow streak passed $600 million, and oil pulled back on Middle East diplomacy.

title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
summary: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.
